title: Figure 3 in Salenthydrobia gen. nov. (Rissooidea: Hydrobiidae)
author: Wilke, Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 3. Maximum likelihood tree for hydrobiine taxa based on 1127 bp of the combined COI and 16S genes. Mercuria similis and Pseudamnicola lucensis were used as outgroups. The scale bar indicates the expected number of substitutions according to the model of sequence evolution applied. For taxon A, individual DNA isolation numbers are given. Bootstrap values (in percentage) are provided (for details see text).
